steps.title: Identify the causal chain
steps.content: The passage links three elements: rewards trigger dopamine; dopamine is required for fan cells; fan cells are necessary for associative memories. The word “Consequently” signals we must apply this chain logically.

steps.title: Apply the chain to the answer choices
steps.content:
Following that sequence, rewards should increase capacity to form associative memories—which is exactly what choice C states.

The other three either contradict the dopamine-fan cell mechanism, focus on recognizing differences rather than forming connections, or reverse causality.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
